message:
feat(search): Enhance ANN index and query parsing capabilities

Major search infrastructure improvements:

lib.rs:
- Wire up HNSW approximate search in query execution path
- Add --ef-search parameter for tuning recall/speed tradeoff
- Improve semantic search result ranking

search/ann_index.rs:
- Implement search() method returning AnnSearchResult
- Add ef_search parameter for query-time configuration
- Improve error handling for missing/corrupt indices

search/query.rs:
- Extend ParsedTerm with sub-term support for complex queries
- Add query optimization for common patterns
- Improve boolean operator parsing

search/vector_index.rs:
- Add helper methods for index stats

ui/tui.rs:
- Add ANN search indicator in status bar
- Display ef_search parameter in search options

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
